infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: GigaChad needs your location to validate disruption claims and protect your income.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysAndWhenInUseUsageDescrip: GigaChad tracks your location during active shifts to automatically process income protection claims.
infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: GigaChad uses your camera to capture evidence photos/videos for claim submissions.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: GigaChad accesses your photos to let you attach evidence to disruption claims.

plugins.locationAlwaysAndWhenInUsePermission: GigaChad uses your location to verify disruption claims and protect your income.
plugins.locationAlwaysPermission: GigaChad tracks location during shifts to auto-process claims.

plugins.photosPermission: GigaChad needs photo access to attach evidence to your disruption claims.
plugins.cameraPermission: GigaChad uses the camera to capture live evidence for claim submissions.
